brief_html: This message is sent to upgrade an XSHA-1 account to an NLS/SRP-style account. It should be sent when S>C 0x53 SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGON or S>C 0x55 SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTCHANGE indicates that an account upgrade is required.
remarks_html: This message is sent to upgrade an XSHA-1 account to an NLS/SRP-style account. It should be sent when S>C 0x53 SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGON or S>C 0x55 SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTCHANGE indicates that an account upgrade is required.
